title: Vanguard SMP
description: A collection of mods centered around Create & Distant Horizons, the emphasis is on exploration and shaping your world.
body:
This is a collection of mods for the Vanguard SMP server.

Requires [JDK 17](https://adoptium.net/temurin/releases/?version=17)
- [Macaw's Lights and Lamps](https://modrinth.com/mod/w4an97C2) [1.1.1] by SketchMacaw
- [More Mob Variants](https://modrinth.com/mod/JiEhJ3WG) [1.3.0.1] by nyuppo
- [Villager Names](https://modrinth.com/mod/gqRXDo8B) [8.0] by Rick South
- [Extra Origins](https://modrinth.com/mod/XWEESDPe) [1.20-8] by MoriyaShiine
- [Macaw's Bridges](https://modrinth.com/mod/GURcjz8O) [3.0.0] by SketchMacaw
- [BotanyTrees](https://modrinth.com/mod/mvs7RoIW) [9.0.11] by Darkhax
- [Pehkui](https://modrinth.com/mod/t5W7Jfwy) [3.8.3+1.14.4-1.21] by Virtuoel

- [Bosses of Mass Destruction (Beta)](https://modrinth.com/mod/du3UfiLL) [1.7.5-1.20.1] by Barribob
